title: Measurement
description: A usage measurement submitted to Octane for tracking and billing purposes.

meter_name.description: Name of the meter this measurement belongs to.

customer_name.description: Name of the customer this measurement belongs to.

event_name.description: Name of the event that generated this measurement.

time.description: Timestamp of when the measurement occurred.

labels.description: Key-value labels associated with the measurement for filtering and grouping.

reset_total.description: Whether to reset the running total for this customer/meter combination.
